title: Malaysian Smoky Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy Malaysian-inspired wrap filled with smoky chicken and crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Boneless, skinless chicken breast
ingredients.notes: Marinated in a mixture of soy sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes

ingredients.name: Coleslaw made with red cabbage, carrots, and zesty dressing
Dissolved sugar
ingredients.notes: Added to balance the heat from the chipotle

ingredients.name: Fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Chopped and used as a garnish

ingredients.name: Malaysian chili sauce
ingredients.notes: Added to the chicken for extra heat

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a layer of coleslaw on each wrap, followed by a few slices of grilled chicken, pickled carrots and daikon, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Drizzle with Malaysian chili sauce and serve immediately.
